nasb.text: Esther said, “A foe and an enemy is this wicked Haman!” Then Haman became terrified before the king and queen.

esv.text: And Esther said, “A foe and enemy! This wicked Haman!” Then Haman was terrified before the king and the queen.

cnv.text: 以斯帖回答：“這敵人和仇人，就是這惡人哈曼！”哈曼在王和王后面前立刻驚惶萬分。

ccb.text: 以斯帖回答说：“敌人和仇家就是这恶人哈曼！”哈曼在王和王后面前十分惊恐。
